code: import api from'./api';const orderService={getAll:async function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};const response=await api.get('/orders',{params});return response.data;},getById:async id=>{const response=await api.get("/orders/".concat(id));return response.data;},create:async data=>{const response=await api.post('/orders',data);return response.data;},updateStatus:async(id,status)=>{const response=await api.put("/orders/".concat(id,"/status"),{status});return response.data;},processPayment:async(id,paymentMethod)=>{const response=await api.put("/orders/".concat(id,"/payment"),{paymentMethod});return response.data;},delete:async id=>{const response=await api.delete("/orders/".concat(id));return response.data;}};export default orderService;
